import numpy as np
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer


class EmbeddingCache:
    def __init__(self, model_name: str = "all-MiniLM-L6-v2"):
        self._model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)
        self._cache: dict[str, np.ndarray] = {}

    def encode(self, text: str) -> np.ndarray:
        if text not in self._cache:
            self._cache[text] = self._model.encode(text)
        return self._cache[text]

    def encode_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> np.ndarray:
        uncached = [t for t in texts if t not in self._cache]
        if uncached:
            embeddings = self._model.encode(uncached)
            for text, emb in zip(uncached, embeddings):
                self._cache[text] = emb
        return np.array([self._cache[t] for t in texts])


embedding_cache = EmbeddingCache()


def search_similar_documents(query: str, documents: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    query_embedding = embedding_cache.encode(query)
    doc_embeddings = embedding_cache.encode_batch(documents)
    
    similarities = np.dot(doc_embeddings, query_embedding)
    top_indices = np.argsort(similarities)[::-1][:5]
    return [documents[i] for i in top_indices]
